originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&xGridSpacing` is never used.

model:
(define-fun AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING () Bool
  true)
reasoning: No TRUE (known) record for e30bfedce4d.c; the ERROR comment at L21 marks the known VBDB bug but the alarm is for a different location. This alarm detects xGridSpacing = left_probe_bed_position at L24 (inside #ifdef AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID): xGridSpacing is assigned but never subsequently read — genuine dead store, new bug. ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING=T internally #defines AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID (L2), making the PC {AUTO_BED=T, GRID=T} consistent and correct. The dead store at L24 requires both AUTO_BED=T (for the function block) and GRID=T (for the L23-L24 block). Compare with PRODUCT_41 (TRUE_NEW_UNDER) which incorrectly broadens the PC to include GRID=F, and PRODUCT_163 (UNKNOWN, contradictory: AUTO_BED=T but GRID=F). Correctly constrained.
